title: Headspace — Guided Meditation App
description: A beginner-friendly meditation app with short daily sessions, sleep sounds, and focus music. Free tier available.

title: Couch to 5K Running Plan
description: A structured 9-week program that gradually builds running stamina. Great for anyone new to running.

title: Budget Bytes — Healthy Eating on a Budget
description: Hundreds of nutritious recipes with cost breakdowns per serving. Meal plans and grocery lists included.

title: Calm — Sleep & Relaxation
description: Sleep stories, breathing exercises, and relaxation techniques. Excellent for stress management.
